title: pelargonium × lateripes
intro: Pelargonium × lateripes, also known as Cape Rose or Cape Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the pelargonium genus, native to South Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory qualities, which make it useful in treating wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × lateripes include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate headaches and fever, and provide relief from digestive problems such as diarrhea and indigestion. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide health benefits.
